title: CyberSecQwen-4B：为何防御性网络需要小型、专业化、可本地运行的模型
title_en: CyberSecQwen-4B: Why Defensive Cyber Needs Small, Specialized, Locally-Runnable Models
summary: 本文介绍了CyberSecQwen-4B，一个基于Qwen2.5-4B微调的小型网络安全专用模型，专为防御性网络任务设计。该模型可在本地运行，无需依赖云端API，从而降低延迟并增强数据隐私。文章强调了在资源受限环境中部署专业化小模型对于实时威胁检测和响应的重要性。This article introduces CyberSecQwen-4B, a small cybersecurity-specialized model fine-tuned from Qwen2.5-4B, designed for defensive cyber tasks. It runs locally without cloud API dependencies, reducing latency and enhancing data privacy. The article emphasizes the importance of deploying specialized small models in resource-constrained environments for real-time threat detection and response.
